calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Title To Personal Property
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Petitioner.

The Court stated that it has no problem with the Shelton Capital accounts, but there is an issue with the Air Products account with a different account number than what was listed on Schedule A. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Title to Personal Property as to the Shelton Capital Management accounts and 2993 shares of the Air Products account with their proceeds (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Title To Personal Property
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Continued

Petition For Order Confirming Title To Personal Property
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Continued To Jan-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
